name: exoware-qmdb-ts
description: Browser client for the ordered Exoware QMDB proof API.

scripts.build:wasm: CC=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang AR=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/llvm-ar CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/exoware-codex-target-qmdb-wasm wasm-pack build ../wasm --target web --mode no-install --no-opt --out-dir ../ts/src/generated/wasm --out-name exoware_qmdb_wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && tsc && rm -rf dist/generated && mkdir -p dist/generated && cp -R src/generated/wasm dist/generated/wasm
